messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0041",
  "title": "投融资事件数量",
  "page_index": 13,
  "page_range": "13"
}

Section text:
## 投融资事件数量

相较于2024年同比大幅下跌

-54%

message.content: Topic/Metric: Investment and financing event volume. Claim/Trend: Significant year-on-year decline. Date/Reference: 2024 (comparison baseline). Value: -54%. Evidence Type: Quantitative statistic. This section can answer retrieval questions regarding the directional trend, exact percentage change, and baseline comparison year for investment and financing activity. It contains no definitions, procedures, tables, or figures.
